arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti refuses to dwell on late Real Madrid slip at Atletico Madrid
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti was determined to move on as his Real Madrid side drew 1-1 at Atletico Madrid. On a night of major controversy at the Estadio Metropolitano, Ancelotti was not a central figure, as his team slipped up late on. Eder Militao’s second half goal triggered chaos in the stands as the game was suspended […] The post Carlo Ancelotti refuses to dwell on late Real Madrid slip at Atletico Madrid appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star Vinícius Jr. levels Barcelona’s Lamine Yamal in Madrid Derby

arts.ttl: Atletico secure last-gasp Real Madrid draw after feisty derby suspended due to crowd trouble
arts.sum: Eventful LaLiga clash interrupted for 20 minutes after home fans threw objects onto the pitch

arts.ttl: Atletico 1-1 Real Madrid: Highlights, man of the match, stats from Madrid derby
arts.sum: Angel Correa registers a last-gasp leveller as Atletico Madrid draw 1-1 with Real Madrid in Sunday night's Madrid derby in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Three questions and three answers from Atlético Madrid 1-1 Real Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid suffered a night to forget in a 1-1 Madrid derby draw with Atlético Madrid which will live longer in the memory for the scenes off the field as Atlético ultras forced the game to be suspended having thrown items at goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois. Since news broke that Kylian Mbappé would miss this game due to a muscle injury suffered late on against Deportivo Alavés in midweek, the talk has been about how Carlo Ancelotti would replace the Frenchman and adjust his system.

arts.ttl: Immediate Reaction: Atlético Madrid 1-1 Real Madrid
arts.sum: The first half didn’t live up to the Madrid-derby name, with a handful of half chances falling Real Madrid ’s way. Koke and Diego Simeone pleading with fans behind the goal after play halted due to items thrown at Real Madrid goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois.

arts.ttl: Why Real Madrid star apologised to an Atlético fan during derby

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid vs Real Madrid SUSPENDED as fans 'throw poo' at Thibaut Courtois
arts.sum: The huge La Liga clash was halted in the 68th minute after Real Madrid goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois complained about objects thrown towards him - including a lighter
